title: Budget battery and network for background work
description: Batch network and wake-ups, respect OS background limits, and avoid polling so the app does not drain battery or data.
body: Use when adding background sync, location tracking, polling, or frequent network calls on mobile. Do not hold wake locks, poll on a tight timer, or fetch on every foreground without coalescing. Actions: batch requests, use OS-scheduled jobs (WorkManager/BackgroundTasks) that honor Doze/App Standby, back off on metered networks, and measure energy and data impact. Validation signals include a battery/energy profiler trace and a network log showing batched, throttled traffic. Risk boundary: excessive background activity gets the app throttled or killed by the OS and reviewed poorly by users; escalate before adding any always-on background loop.
